title: February 12
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|February|hide30=yes|hide31=yes}}

'''February 12''' is the 43rd day of the year. There are 322 days remaining, 323 in leap years.</noinclude>
*[[1940s#1942|1942]] – [[Terry Bisson]] is born.
*[[1960s#1964|1964]] – [[Raphael Sbarge]] is born.
*[[1970]] – [[Dave Crossman]] is born.
*1970 – [[Judd Winick]] is born.
*[[1971]] – [[Scott Menville]] is born.
*[[1973]] – [[Tara Strong]] is born.
*[[1978]] – ''[[Splinter of the Mind's Eye]]'' published.
*[[1980]] – [[Heather Doerksen]] is born.
*[[1983]] – [[Josef Altin]] is born.
*1983 – [[Iko Uwais]] is born.
*[[1984]] – ''[[How to Draw Star Wars Heroes, Creatures, Spaceships, and other Fantastic Things]]'' published.
*1984 – ''[[Star Wars Word Puzzles]]'' published.
*[[1985]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 95|''Star Wars'' (1977) 95]] published.
*[[1997]] – [[Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith 5|''Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith'' 5]] published.
*[[2003]] – ''[[A Valentine Story]]'' published.
*[[2010]] – "[[Duchess of Mandalore]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2014]] – [[Star Wars (2013) 14|''Star Wars'' (2013) 14]] published.
*2014 – ''[[Star Wars: Legacy Book 3]]'' published.
*2014 – ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File Part 6]]'' published.
*2014 – [[W:c:tr.starwars|Turkish ''Star Wars'' wiki, Sithpedi]] founded.
*[[2019]] – ''[[Star Wars: Darth Vader: Dark Lord of the Sith Vol. 4 — Fortress Vader|Darth Vader: Dark Lord of the Sith Vol. 4 — Fortress Vader]]'' published.
*[[2020]] – [[The Rise of Kylo Ren 3|''The Rise of Kylo Ren'' 3]] published.
*[[2024]] – [[Alec Mills]] dies.
*[[2025]] – [[Hyperspace Stories: The Bad Batch—Ghost Agents 1|''Hyperspace Stories: The Bad Batch: Ghost Agents'' 1]] published.
*2025 – [[The High Republic Adventures (2023) 15|''The High Republic Adventures'' (2023) 15]] published.
*[[2026]] – [[Choose Your Destiny: An Obi-Wan & Anakin Adventure (audiobook)|''Mission Stories: Obi-Wan & Anakin'' audiobook]] released.
<noinclude>
